_metadata.created_by: Session G verification retrofit (Claude Opus 4.7, 1M context)
_metadata.honesty_note: D1 plausibility.md / claim.md numerical estimates (PBH count in Milky Way halo, mean inter-PBH spacing, Hawking temperature at asteroid-mass PBH) were mental arithmetic on 2026-04-23. Scripts added 2026-04-24 as new forward-verification.

M_MW_halo_claim.source: claim.md; standard Milky Way halo total mass inference from rotation curves

PBH_mass_claim.source: claim.md; asteroid-mass window middle value 10^17-10^23 g

N_PBH_MW_claim.source: claim.md revision: N ~ M_halo / M_PBH. plausibility.md says 1e18 which is inconsistent with those masses — to be resolved by this check

T_Hawking_claim.source: plausibility.md (claim.md says ~10^-5 K; discrepancy to be resolved by this check)

Omega_DM.source: Planck 2018 VI Omega_matter - Omega_baryons ~ 0.3 - 0.04; rounded to 0.26
